title: Master Hermes Agent in 41 mins
summary: Keith AI demonstrates how to build a practical personal AI system using Hermes by integrating it with Telegram, Gmail, Google Calendar, Apple Health, and social media. The video covers local and cloud deployment options, skills configuration, token cost optimization via OpenRouter, and comparison with OpenClaw.
